(4) The website is extremely thin (single paragraph, generic 555-1234 placeholder phone number), suggesting either a very early-stage operation, a lead-gen aggregator site, or a company with minimal digital maturity — this is both a buying signal (they need better marketing infrastructure) and a caution flag (may have low budget or be a shell operation).
